objective: Independently validate the generated driver-status-badge TOP code fixture, executive handoff, and invocation evidence.
contextSlices: Independently inspect the generated fixture and supplied executive handoff.
Verify that Content asks owner through a narrow access contract and does not decide workflow readiness.
Treat adapter invocation evidence as execution evidence; delivery certification is handled by the certifier.
Write a judicial handoff with status done when the fixture is structurally coherent and no self-certification claim is present.
Do not repair implementation artifacts and do not certify delivery.
stopCondition: Write one handoff artifact and stop.
